channel.title: System on Piecewise
channel.description: Recent content in System on Piecewise

item.title: (mode) file (file) with text (text)
item.description: In System → Files Jump to block Write text to a file Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description mode any ✓ The operation to perform file String ✓ The file to write, relative to the .lazurite data directory. text String ✓ The text to write to the file. This will overwrite the existing text in the file. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: (stream) of command (result)
item.description: In System → Commands Jump to block Returns the specified stream from the result. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description stream any ✓ The stream to return. result command_result ✓ The result to return the stream from. Output String - The stream. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: contents of file (file) as text
item.description: In System → Files Jump to block Read the contents of a file as text Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description file String ✓ The file to read, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Output String - The contents of the file window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: create directory (directory)
item.description: In System → Files Jump to block Create a directory Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description directory String ✓ The directory to create, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Directories will be created recursively, i.e. if you specify path/to/directory, path and path/to will also be created if they don’t already exist. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: delete item (file)
item.description: In System → Files Jump to block Delete a file Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description file String ✓ The file or directory to delete, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: execute command (command) with arguments (arguments)
item.description: In System → Commands Jump to block Execute a command on the system. See the documentation for more information, including potential pitfalls. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description command String ✓ The command to execute. NOTE: this command is executed in the current $SHELL or %ComSpec% (i.e. sh or cmd), and the current working directory is specified as the .

item.title: exit code of command (result)
item.description: In System → Commands Jump to block Get the exit code from a command result. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description result command_result ✓ The command result to obtain the exit code from. Output Number - The exit code from a command result. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: file (file) (property)
item.description: In System → Files Jump to block Checks if a file exists, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description file String ✓ The file to check property any ✓ The property to check Output Boolean - Whether the file exists window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "

item.title: files in directory (directory)
item.description: In System → Files Jump to block List the files in a directory Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description directory String ✓ The directory to list files of, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Output Array - The files in the directory window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: value of environment variable with name (name) or default (default)
item.description: In System → Environment Jump to block Get the value of an environment variable. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description name String ✓ The name of the environment variable to fetch. default String The default value to return if the environment variable is not set. Output String - The value of the environment variable. window.

item.title: 🔥 raise error (error)
item.description: In System → Error Handling Jump to block Raise an error. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description error String ✓ The error to raise. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"system_throw","message0":"🔥 raise error %1"
